claim: LangGraph enables multi-agent coordination through explicit state management and message-passing between agent nodes in a directed acyclic graph structure.
actionable: Use LangGraph to structure multi-agent systems with clear message-passing patterns and state management instead of ad-hoc agent communication.

claim: Agent swarms benefit from hierarchical delegation where coordinator agents route tasks to specialist sub-agents rather than all agents executing in parallel.
actionable: Design multi-agent swarms with a hierarchy: use coordinator agents to route subtasks to specialists based on task requirements.
